headline: Is PPG Industries (PPG) Offering Value After Mixed Long Term Share Performance?
summary: If you are wondering whether PPG Industries at around US$113.80 is offering fair value or a potential mispricing, the next sections will break down what the current share price might be implying. The stock has returned 0.7% over the last week, 2.0% over the last month, 9.1% year to date and 3.8% over the past year, while longer periods show declines of 12.7% over three years and 28.9% over five years, which may affect how you think about its risk and reward profile.
